Name: Chocolatey - Pin Package
Description: Allows pinning versions of packages using the Chocolatey package manager.

Parameters.Name: ChocolateyPackagePinId
Parameters.Label: (Required) Package Name
Parameters.HelpText:
The name of the Chocolatey package to install. Install multiple packages by separating them with a space.

Examples:

* _git_
* _git_ _vscode_ _notepadplusplus_

Parameters.Name: ChocolateyPackagePinVersion
Parameters.Label: (Optional) Package Version
Parameters.HelpText: If a specific version of the Chocolatey package is required enter it here. If you specify a version this will apply to all packages in 'Package Name'. Otherwise, leave this field blank to use the latest version. Example: _2.3.4_.

Parameters.Name: ChocolateyPackagePinAction
Parameters.Label: (Required) Pin Action
Parameters.HelpText: The Chocolatey pin action to take place. You can add a pin or remove an existing pin.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
add|Add a package pin
remove|Remove an existing package pin

Parameters.Name: ChocolateyPackagePinReason
Parameters.Label: (Optional) Pin Reason
Parameters.HelpText:
The reason for the package being pinned. 

_NOTE: This only works with Chocolatey For Business editions 1.12.2+_
